videos.title: TEM MUITOS FANTASMAS na MINHA CASA NOVA | Luluca
videos.description:
TEM MUITOS FANTASMAS na MINHA CASA NOVA | Luluca
Gente ainda não tinha procurado fantasmas na casa nova e adivinhem??? Achei muitos e um deles me assustou muito.
Me Sigam no Instagram 📸 @luluca_oficial

Já deixe seu LuLike... Compartilhe esse vídeo com seus amigos e SE INSCREVA no canal que ficarei muito feliz! Um super beijo  #luluca #crescendocomluluca

SIGAM MINHAS REDES SOCIAIS:

❤ Instagram - luluca_oficial

videos.title: Gibran Alcocer The Best Ambient Playlist for Relaxation and Focus
videos.description:
Hello everyone! 🌟
I hope you're all doing well! 😊 Today, I’m excited to share a special playlist featuring my favorite tracks composed by the talented Gibran Alcocer. These soothing melodies are perfect for calming your mind during tough moments or when you need to find peace. I truly hope this playlist brings you comfort and serenity. 🤗💖

⚠️ Disclaimer:
I do not own the songs or videos featured here. All rights belong to their respective copyright holders. If there are any issues or if you'd like me to remove the content, please contact me directly.

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

Playlist Details 🎵
🎼 Composed & Arranged by: Gibran Alcocer & Andrea Vanzo
🎥 Video Creator: Nomadic Ambience



Follow the Artists 🌟

➤ YouTube Channel

Nomadic Ambience
➤ YouTube Channel

----------------------------------------------------------------

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

Copyright Info ℹ️

❗️ If you'd like to use any of the music, please reach out to the respective labels or composers.

📩 For business inquiries or copyright issues, contact me at: floresnarcisogerson@gmail.com
